CheckTitle: Okta password policies enforce a 24-hour minimum password age
Description: **Okta Password Policy minimum password age** should require at least 24 hours before another password change in every active policy.
Risk: **Too-short minimum password age** allows users to cycle through password history quickly and return to a previously used password.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Set minimum password age to at least 24 hours in every active Okta Password Policy** to make password history controls harder to bypass.
